grow_invoices.title: Coffee shop catering invoice
grow_invoices.demo_goal: Show a strong invoice-backed credit profile from structured revenue and on-time payment.

compliance_notes: Required buyer and seller fields present
Ledger entry linked to source document

feature_contributions.reason: A stronger transaction graph improves confidence in real business activity.
Repeat counterparties show durable buyer or supplier relationships.
Stable cashflow reduces short-term repayment uncertainty.
Payment timeliness is a direct repayment-quality signal.
Positive public reputation supports business legitimacy.
Verified counterparties reduce identity and invoice-quality uncertainty.
Recent complaints reduce confidence and trigger review.

partner_offers.reason: Optional growth line for a merchant with stable cashflow.
Protects stock or seasonal inventory tied to upcoming sales.

smartbot_advice.message: No urgent borrowing is required, but a small prequalified line can support planned inventory growth.
smartbot_advice.disclaimer: Demo advisory output, not a binding credit decision.
